'''Krann''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]],<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> on the [[Enarc Run/Legends|Enarc Run]]. It was taken over by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for its [[Nova crystal/Legends|nova crystals]], and the native [[Kluuzot]] were enslaved. Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] seceded and established a neutral terrority. The Kluuzot were freed, and various commercial investors moved to the planet.<ref name="FKM" />

{{Planet-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Krann was introduced in the [[1993]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook [[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']], which placed it in the Opiteihr system. The sourcebook also introduced the [[Krann system/Legends|Krann system]] of the same name but placed that system on the [[Harrin Trade Corridor]].
